chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1450 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 28.11.2025 Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri, Assistant A.G Sindh *** None present for the petitioner. No intimation is received. Same was the position on the last two consecutive dates of hearing. The conduct displayed by the petitioner prima facie indicates that he has lost interest in the matter. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
